description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the 5.x branch and on pull requests to 5.x. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-20.04 with different libvips versions, including 8.12.0. For each job, check out the code, install dependencies, build and test the project, and optionally generate a coverage report. Additionally, create a second job to publish the Docker image to GitHub Container Registry after the CI job succeeds.
